attacks_against_the_demon_are_made_with_: Attacks against the demon are made with disadvantage
attacks_against_the_imp_are_made_with_di: Attacks against the imp are made with disadvantage
ability_1_moves_to_the_door_and_opens_th: Ability 1: Moves to the door and opens the room
ability_1_move_1_attack_1_as_an_area_att: Ability 1: Move -1, Attack -1 as an area attack #30
v_number_of_scouts_on_the_map: V = number of scouts on the map
ability_1_heals_2_to_itself_and_all_alli: Ability 1: Heals 2 to itself and all allies
ability_2_all_allies_gain_1_to_all_attac: Ability 2: All allies gain +1 to all attacks for the entire round. Attacks +1.
ability_1_summons_living_bones_attacks_1: Ability 1: Summons Living Bones, attacks -1 all adjacent enemies
ability_2_summons_a_living_corpse_moves_: Ability 2: Summons a Living Corpse, moves -1, attacks +2
ability_1_the_altar_moves_summons_a_demo: Ability 1: The altar moves, summons a demon, move +2, attack -1
ability_2_the_altar_moves_summons_a_demo: Ability 2: The altar moves, summons a demon, move +2, attack -1
ability_1_attacks_1_all_adjacent_enemies: Ability 1: Attacks -1 all adjacent enemies, Attacks +0 range 3, Eggs hatch
ability_2_summons_a_clutch_of_eggs_moves: Ability 2: Summons a clutch of eggs, moves -1, attacks +0
ability_1_summons_a_deep_terror_attacks_: Ability 1: Summons a Deep Terror, attacks -3 #32
ability_2_summons_a_deep_terror_attacks_: Ability 2: Summons a Deep Terror, attacks -2 #33
ability_2_move_0_summons_an_imp_attack_1: Ability 2: Move +0, Summons an imp, Attack -1
x_number_of_hexes_moved_before_the_attac: X = number of hexes moved before the attack
ability_1_summons_a_giant_viper_and_infl: Ability 1: Summons a Giant Viper and inflicts terror
ability_1_spends_20_and_summons_a_night_: Ability 1: Spends #20 and summons a Night Demon, applies #24 to itself
ability_2_spends_19_summons_a_sun_demon_: Ability 2: Spends #19, summons a Sun Demon, heals itself 4, Shield 1
all_allies_on_adjacent_hexes_add_1_to_al: All allies on adjacent hexes add +1 to all attacks
all_allies_on_adjacent_hexes_add_2_to_al: All allies on adjacent hexes add +2 to all attacks
all_attacks_against_the_aesther_ashblade: All attacks against the Aesther Ashblade are made with disadvantage
shraka_doubles_the_values_of_all_heal_ac: Shraka doubles the values of all heal actions and, whenever possible, targets the Steel Lion with heal actions
if_shraka_applies_effect_26_or_34_it_app: If Shraka applies effect #26 or #34, it applies that same effect a second time
shield_applies_to_itself_and_all_allies: Shield applies to itself and all allies
if_an_ally_of_the_steel_lion_on_an_adjac: If an ally of the Steel Lion on an adjacent hex becomes the target of an attack, the Steel Lion becomes the target of that attack instead.
in_cases_of_equal_hp_the_steel_lion_does: In cases of equal HP, the Steel Lion does not take damage of 6 or more
all_creatures_summoned_by_uyrat_are_elit: All creatures summoned by Uyrat are elite when 3 or 4 players are playing
when_a_flame_demon_or_earth_demon_is_on_: When a Flame Demon or Earth Demon is on the board, Uyrat may use #22 and #23 as if they had maximum charge.
